zh.Gnosall, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾
zh.Knightley, Staffordshire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾麗莉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley於大約1105年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾麗莉時，他的父親William de Knightley32歲，母親Adeliza Cnichtel28歲。他於1129年與Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1190年在他的家鄉享年87歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

zh-hans.Gnosall, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾
zh-hans.Knightley, Staffordshire, England, Unite: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾麗莉
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley于大约1105年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾麗莉时，他的父亲William de Knightley32岁，母亲Adeliza Cnichtel28岁。他于1129年与Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1190年在他的家乡享年87岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley was born about 1105, in Knightley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Knightley, was 32 and his mother, Adeliza Cnichtel, was 28. He married Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley in 1129, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1190, in his hometown, at the age of 87, and was buried in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley est né environ 1105, à Knightley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Knightley, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Cnichtel, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley en 1129, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1190, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley um 1105 in Knightley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Knightley 32 und seine Mutter Adeliza Cnichtel 28. Er hat 1129 in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1190 im Alter von 87 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley è nato il circa 1105 nel Knightley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Knightley, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza Cnichtel, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley nel 1129, nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1190, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Gnosall, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightleyが約1105年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアナイトリーで生まれた時，父William de Knightleyは32歳，母Adeliza Cnichtelは28歳であった。1129年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルでMrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1190年に故郷で87歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley(이)가 대략 1105년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 나이틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Knightley(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Cnichtel(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1129년 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1190년 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley nasceu aproximadamente 1105, em Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Knightley, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Cnichtel, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley em 1129, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1190, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley родился около 1105 г. в местности нагтли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Knightley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Cnichtel, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley в 1129 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1190 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley nació aproximadamente 1105, en Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Knightley, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Adeliza Cnichtel, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley en 1129, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1190, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
